title: network compatibility endpoints for API
body:
add endpoints for networking compatibility with the API.

Signed-off-by: Brent Baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body: @vrothberg wrt to tests, i want to "use" this a little with some of the compat stuff to see if it fits the bill.  then yes, at that point, tests would be applicable.
